companyNameJapanese: 東京応化工業株式会社
description: World's #1 photoresist manufacturer with 25% global share. Supplies from g-line to cutting-edge EUV photoresists. Also provides high-purity chemicals, thinners, developers.

_externalRelationships.notes: World #1 in photoresist. 80%+ of sales overseas. 25% share in EUV photoresist. Ultimate 'suriawase' with customers.
